name: Video Testimonial Card
description: 1-3 video testimonial tiles with poster thumbnails, hover-scale interaction, and a lightbox iframe player. The first tile gets priority width (4:5 portrait on desktop) when three are shown.

descriptions.descriptive: Tile grid with a play button, gradient legibility scrim, and an optional duration pill. Click opens a 5xl-max lightbox dialog with an autoplaying iframe (YouTube, Vimeo, or direct mp4) and a focus-trapped close control. One tile, two equal tiles, or one priority tile + two stacked secondary tiles.
descriptions.usage: Use when video testimony does work words can't — case-study walk-throughs, customer quote reels, founder retrospectives. Place after a hero or stats section; pair with a closing CTA strip or FAQ tabs at page bottom.
descriptions.audienceFit: B2B SaaS with strong customer narratives, agencies showcasing case studies, conference recap pages, and any segment whose social proof reads better in motion than as static text.
